title: Combat Simulator 2.7.1.1
changes: Improved performance: NPC collision now defaults to the lighter convex hull shape.
Added stuttering warnings to the NPC collision shape and Extend Terrain Detection options.

title: Combat Simulator 2.7.1.0
changes: Added the experimental Dynamic Camera feature.
Improved ragdoll physics and stability.
Improved Armor Detachment.
Fixed several logout, cleanup, and render-related crashes.
Improved overall plugin stability.

title: Combat Simulator 2.7.0.1
changes: Added BEPU-based hair physics for ragdolls.
Added tuning options for visual-only cloth detachment.
Added an option to spawn virtual enemies directly in front of the player.
Fixed several ragdoll and dismemberment crash issues.
Improved overall stability for public builds.

title: Combat Simulator 2.7.0.0
changes: Added an experimental cloth tube physics model for Armor Detachment (Body and Legs) — garments now wrap the body and slide down naturally instead of folding.
Added tube tuning options (friction, handoff delay), a debug wireframe, and a new Visual Only cloth hold profile.
Improved Advanced Clothing Settle stability, with less deformation on physics handoff and per-segment coat skirt draping.
NPC ragdolls can now collide with and rest on skinned meshes such as mounts and other characters.
Fixed mounted-death dismemberment being enabled by default.

title: Combat Simulator 2.6.0.2
changes: Improved plugin security.
Camera and combat recipe selections are now remembered between sessions.

title: Combat Simulator 2.6.0.1
changes: Disable Fighting Mode due to security concerns.

title: Combat Simulator 2.6.0.0
changes: Added the Armor Detachment control window under Professional Mode > Effects.
Added Fighting Mode (experimental).
Improved ragdoll physics tuning and stability overall.
